{{Quote|We brought in some Rogue Squadron veterans—Riemann, Scotian, Carithlee, several more—and a couple of new pilots each out of Gauntlet and Corsair Squadrons. Now that you're back, they all return to their original units.|Derek Klivian, to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="XW5" />}}
'''Carithlee''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the elite [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] at some point by [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] before leaving the [[Squadron/Legends|unit]]. When a [[Ersatz Rogue Squadron|temporary Rogue Squadron]] was formed during the genuine Rogues' unsanctioned [[Bacta War|campaign]] against [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] leader [[Ysanne Isard]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], Carithlee was chosen to fill in the replacement unit's ranks. Once members of the original Rogue Squadron resumed their duties, Carithlee and most of the other pilots of the ersatz unit returned to their previous assignments with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
===Going Rogue again===
{{Quote|It's not ersatz. Just sort of auxiliary. For morale purposes, the Alliance needed a visible Rogue Squadron, while you were off playing pirate.|Derek Klivian, to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="XW5" />}}
[[File:Rogue_Squadron.svg|thumb|right|250px|Carithlee was a member of Rogue Squadron.]]
Carithlee was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and a member of the elite<ref name="XW5" /> [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]<ref name="RS">[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]</ref> and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Squadron/Legends|unit]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] at some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="XW5" /> By [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref> Carithlee, considered one of the squadron's veterans, was no longer with the Rogues and instead served with another unit.<ref name="XW5" />

After the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|liberated]] from Imperial control,<ref name="XW2">''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''</ref> the Imperial ruler, [[Ysanne Isard]], [[Mission above Imperial City|retreated]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. Isard's departure prompted the entire Rogue Squadron, [[Rogue Leader/Legends|led]] by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], to resign their commissions with the New Republic to wage an unsanctioned [[Bacta War|war]] against the Imperial leader.<ref name="XW3">''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]''</ref>

In the Rogues' absence, the [[New Republic Provisional Council|New Republic government]] opted to form an [[ersatz Rogue Squadron]], believing that the very existence of some incarnation of Rogue Squadron was vital for maintaining morale among the general populace during that [[Hunt for Zsinj|period of the war]]. The newly created Rogue Squadron was led by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]]. Carithlee, alongside several other former Rogues and some new recruits, was chosen for inclusion into Klivian's unit.<ref name="XW5" /> The squadron served together for approximately six [[Standard month/Legends|months]].<ref name="Time">According to ''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'', four [[Standard month/Legends|months]] elapsed between [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] escape from the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''—which occurred shortly before the beginning of the [[Bacta War]]—and his [[Wedding of Corran Horn and Mirax Terrik|marriage]] to [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]] at the end of the campaign. ''X-wing: The Bacta War'' also states that [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] remained on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] for "a couple of months" to help train the newly created [[Thyferran Aerospace Defense Force]].</ref>

===Stunt flying above Coruscant===
{{Quote|Wrong designations, sir. We're Rogue Squadron. You're simply a rogue squadron. But for the next few minutes we'll do you the courtesy of designating ourselves Red Squadron to avoid confusion. We're your escort.|Derek Klivian, to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="XW5" />}}
[[File:Rogue_Squadron_Scalf.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The two Rogue Squadrons met in the skies of Coruscant.]]
After the genuine Rogue Squadron successfully [[Battle of Thyferra|defeated Isard]], its pilots were reinstated as a New Republic military unit, with the Rogues' return being staged as a public event. Carithlee and the rest of the ersatz squadron flew their [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] and greeted Antilles and his pilots upon their return to Coruscant.<ref name="XW5" />

In order to avoid confusion with [[Callsign/Legends|call signs]], Klivian temporarily renamed his unit to [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]. Carithlee and the rest of Red Squadron then engaged the Rogues in a friendly competition of precision flying above the crowded [[Imperial Plaza (Imperial Palace)|Imperial Plaza]], impressing the onlookers with elaborate stunts, such as the [[Three Diamonds Parade Formation]].<ref name="XW5" />

The two squadrons then landed among the cheering crowd at the plaza, where the pilots of both units greeted each other. During this [[Time/Legends|time]], Antilles toyed with an idea of creating a new starfighter-[[Commando/Legends|commando]] unit, which would eventually be dubbed [[Wraith Squadron]]. Klivian provided Antilles with personnel files of his temporary squadron for inspection and possible inclusion into the new squadron. However, Carithlee was not chosen by Antilles. Instead, when the ersatz Rogue Squadron was disbanded, Carithlee returned to the pilot's previous unit.<ref name="XW5" />

==Skills and abilities==
{{Quote|Your Red Squadron looks pretty good, Hobbie. A pity you haven't had time to teach them anything about precision flying.|Wedge Antilles|<ref name="XW5" />}}
Carithlee was able to pilot a T-65 [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] and was considered a veteran member of Rogue Squadron, an elite starfighter unit,<ref name="XW5" /> by 7 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].<ref name="Date" /> However, during the two Rogue Squadrons' friendly face-off above Coruscant, Wedge Antilles was unimpressed with the flying skills of Carithlee and the pilot's squadron mates.<ref name="XW5" />

==Behind the scenes==
Carithlee appeared briefly in the [[1998]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'', the fifth volume in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] series, by [[Aaron Allston]].<ref name="XW5" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
